response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: No vocal music was performed; performed manual transcription and translation for Todoroki Hajime's spoken announcements. 2. JSON Usage: Utilized custom translation to capture her adorable pronunciation quirks (e.g., 'minachama' for 'everyone', 'mochiagemasu' for 'announce'). 3. Timing & Pacing: Timed each subtitle block precisely to her vocal bursts, including her second live check segment at the end of the clip.

subtitles.original: えー、みなちゃまー！
subtitles.english: Uh, hello everyone!

subtitles.original: 本日は、轟はじめ生誕祭2026
subtitles.english: Today, for Todoroki Hajime Birthday Celebration 2026...

subtitles.original: 「Rise in motion」に
subtitles.english: ...'Rise in motion'...

subtitles.original: お越しくださいまして
subtitles.english: ...thank you so much for coming!

subtitles.original: 誠にありがとうございます！
subtitles.english: Thank you very much!

subtitles.original: えー、開演に先立ちまして
subtitles.english: Uh, prior to the start of the show,

subtitles.original: みなちゃまにお願いとご案内をもちあげます！
subtitles.english: we have some requests and guidance for everyone!

subtitles.original: えー、当配信は一部収録を含みますが、
subtitles.english: Uh, this stream contains some pre-recorded segments,

subtitles.original: 生配信部分もございますので、
subtitles.english: but there are also live parts,

subtitles.original: いっぱいコメントして盛り上げてください！
subtitles.english: so please leave lots of comments and liven things up!

subtitles.original: 今もね、じわーっていっぱい、おお、こんちくわー、
subtitles.english: Even now, there are so many comments like "Konchikuwa" (Hello),

subtitles.original: きたー、パチパチパチと、ありがとうございます！
subtitles.english: "It's here!" and clapping. Thank you so much!

subtitles.original: えー、当配信のハッシュタグは
subtitles.english: Uh, the hashtag for this stream is...

subtitles.original: 「#轟はじめ生誕祭2026」です！
SNSでたくさんポストしていただけると嬉しいです！
subtitles.english: I'd be glad if you could post a lot on social media!

subtitles.original: えー、開演中はカメラやスマートフォンなどによる写真撮影大歓迎なので
subtitles.english: Uh, taking photos with cameras or smartphones is highly welcome during the show,

subtitles.original: たくさんポストして盛り上げていただけると幸いです！
subtitles.english: so I'd appreciate it if you could post them and liven things up!

subtitles.original: えー、それでは開演までしばらくお待ちください！
subtitles.english: Uh, well then, please wait a little longer until the show starts!

subtitles.original: えー、みなちゃまー！
subtitles.english: Uh, hello everyone!

subtitles.original: 本日は、轟はじめ生誕祭2026
subtitles.english: Today, for Todoroki Hajime Birthday Celebration 2026...

subtitles.original: 「Rise in motion」に
subtitles.english: ...'Rise in motion'...

subtitles.original: お越しくださいまして
subtitles.english: ...thank you so much for coming!

subtitles.original: 誠にありがとうございます、パート２！
subtitles.english: Thank you very much! Part 2!

subtitles.original: どれどれ？なんか、ぐるぐるしてなさそうですね、みなちゃん！
subtitles.english: Let's see. Looks like there's no buffering/lagging for everyone!

subtitles.original: おおー、って、ワクワク、こんちくわ、と、大丈夫そうです！
subtitles.english: Oh! "Excited," "Konchikuwa"... Looks like everything is fine!

subtitles.original: 開演に先立ちまして、みなちゃまにお願いとご案内を、ちょっともう一回もちあげます！
subtitles.english: Prior to the start, let me make some requests and guidance for everyone once more!

subtitles.original: えー、当配信は一部収録を含みますが、
subtitles.english: Uh, this stream contains some pre-recorded segments,

subtitles.original: 生配信部分もございますので、いっぱいコメントして盛り上げていただけると嬉しいです！
subtitles.english: but there are also live parts, so I'd be happy if you could leave lots of comments and liven things up!
